overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART metro system in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through dark neon-lit urban canyons, underground tunnels, and station stops before emerging into bright daylight. The journey features futuristic architecture, industrial corridors, and dramatic lighting transitions between enclosed spaces and open elevated tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track through neon-lit urban canyon

agents.ego_description: riding the NCART train through a narrow urban canyon with towering buildings and neon advertisements

entered.detail: large industrial building with prominent yellow THORTON signage and horizontal windows
multiple glowing vertical advertisement screens on building facades
yellow-painted metal train track structure running alongside the route
tall dark building walls creating a narrow corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view from inside the NCART train moving through a dark urban canyon. The THORTON building dominates the center view with its yellow signage, while neon billboards illuminate the left side. The space is narrow and enclosed by tall buildings, with artificial neon lighting providing most of the illumination.

events.description: train enters a dark underground tunnel from the partially lit urban canyon

agents.ego_description: traveling through a dark underground tunnel with occasional industrial lights and steam vents

entered.detail: dark concrete and metal tunnel walls with industrial texture
air conditioning units venting white steam into the tunnel
large metal pipes running along the tunnel ceiling and walls

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dark underground tunnel, transitioning from the neon-lit canyon to a dimly lit industrial passage. Steam vents release white vapor on the right side, while the walls are bare concrete and metal. The lighting becomes significantly darker, with only occasional artificial lights illuminating the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station platform with waiting area

events.description: train arrives at and stops at an NCART station platform

agents.ego_description: stopped at the station platform, observing the surroundings and a passenger waiting nearby

notable_agents.action: standing on the platform waiting for the train doors to open

entered.detail: concrete platform with tactile paving strips and safety lines
metal and concrete roof covering the platform with exposed beams
transparent glass panels separating the track from the platform area

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at an NCART station platform, transitioning from the dark tunnel to a semi-covered station environment. A passenger stands waiting on the right side of the platform. The station features concrete platforms, glass walls, and overhead roofing with industrial metal beams. The train comes to a complete stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial train corridor approaching Japantown South

events.description: train departs the station and enters dark industrial corridors

agents.ego_description: departing the station and accelerating through dark industrial corridors toward the next stop

entered.detail: dark metal and concrete walls with industrial paneling and warning stripes
heavy steel I-beams supporting the corridor structure

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and re-enters the dark industrial tunnel system. The corridor features heavy metal support beams and concrete walls with industrial detailing. The environment is enclosed and artificially lit, with the train accelerating through the passage toward Japantown South.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track with open city view and bright daylight

events.description: train emerges from dark tunnel into bright daylight with clear sky visible

agents.ego_description: emerging from the darkness into bright daylight, traveling on an elevated track with panoramic views of the city skyline

entered.detail: clear blue sky visible overhead after emerging from the tunnel
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible in the distance
exposed metal rails and support structure of the elevated train track

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the dark industrial tunnel into bright daylight, revealing a wide-open view of the city. The transition from artificial darkness to natural sunlight is dramatic, with clear blue sky visible overhead and distant futuristic skyscrapers lining the horizon. The track is now elevated and exposed to the open air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit urban canyon into the depths of an industrial tunnel before coming to a halt at a transit station. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor of skyscrapers, where the yellow signage of the THORTON building and vibrant billboards cast an artificial glow over the enclosed space. As the train plunges forward, the neon lights vanish and the scene shifts into a dark underground tunnel characterized by bare concrete walls and bursts of white vapor from steam vents. The environment then opens up as the train emerges from the gloom into a semi-covered NCART station, revealing industrial metal beams and glass walls. The movement finally concludes as the camera slows to a complete stop beside a lone passenger waiting on the concrete platform.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive confinement of an industrial tunnel into the expansive brilliance of a sunlit cityscape. It begins as the train departs the station and accelerates back into a dark corridor defined by heavy metal support beams and concrete walls. As the train gains speed through the artificially lit passage, the enclosed environment suddenly gives way to a dramatic burst of natural light. The scene then opens wide into the open air, shifting from subterranean shadows to a clear blue sky and an elevated track. Finally, the view expands to reveal a sprawling urban horizon lined with distant futuristic skyscrapers under the bright daylight.
